items.title: The North Face Presents: Earthside
items.blurb: Original score for The North Face's Earthside film.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Original music for the all-new Ford Bronco by Filson reveal.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Added live instruments and production to the score, with an Americana influence to match the Bronco x Filson world.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A rugged, American sound built around real instrumentation, delivered for the reveal.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Music for Subaru's brand film featuring artist Brooklyn Bell.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Scored to picture, supporting Brooklyn Bell's story without getting in its way.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: An original score for a Subaru brand film.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Original score for Athletic Brewing's Journey to 100 film.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Wrote music to carry the film's emotional arc and match the brand's spirit.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A score that fit Athletic Brewing's story start to finish.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: A brand anthem for La Sportiva.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Composed an original anthem to match the energy of the brand.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A signature piece for La Sportiva's brand film.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Original music for the ANNA film trailer.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Scored the trailer to its rising tension, building a theme that tracked the cut.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A trailer score that set the tone for the film.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Original score for the adventure documentary Crossing Tasmania.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Scored the journey to picture, from the quiet moments to the peaks.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A documentary score that carried the expedition.

items.title: Go There Vol. III — Elan Hagens

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Film score for the Go There series, featuring Elan Hagens.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Scored the film to its sense of place and motion.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: An original score for the Go There series.

blocks.label: The brief
blocks.text: Original music for the Define Your Future commercial.

blocks.label: What I did
blocks.text: Wrote a score built to land the message in a short runtime.

blocks.label: The result
blocks.text: A commercial score tuned to the spot.
